title: semanticdf manifest
description: JSON Schema for the semanticdf `SemanticManifest` artifact. v0.1.11+; older schemaVersions parse via the prefix-match gate but are not validated by this schema.

schemaVersion.description: Wire-format version of the manifest. Bumped on backwards-incompatible changes. v0.1.9, v0.1.10, v0.1.11 are all valid.

kind.description: Discriminator between single-table and joined-manifest kinds. Currently only single-table is implemented; joined is a future recipe.

compiledAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this artifact was emitted.

manifestVersion.description: Semver of the manifest spec. Pre-1.0 (0.x.x) for evolving specs; 1.0.0+ for stable. Defaults to '0.1.0' if absent.

$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema document for validation. Tooling can fetch this and validate the manifest shape.

id.description: Reverse-DNS FQN of the model. Globally unique. Used for cross-referencing between manifests (joined-manifest recipe, future lineage work).

namespace.description: Multi-env deployment scoping (e.g. 'dev', 'prod', 'team-X'). Defaults to 'default' if absent.

metadata.description: Free-form audit object. Flat string values only (recipe §11 Q7). Conventional keys: author, license, tags, sourceRepo, sourceCommit.
